WHO WE ARE

Built for Healing.
Engineered for Excellence.

At Phytness Healthcare, we design and manufacture physiotherapy and rehabilitation equipment that empowers patients to recover faster and live fuller lives.

🏥
CE Certified International Quality Standards
OUR MISSION

Empowering Recovery at Every Step

Our mission is to provide high-quality, reliable, and effective physiotherapy and rehabilitation equipment that enhances the recovery process, promotes physical fitness, and improves overall well-being.

We envision a future where every individual has access to cutting-edge physiotherapy solutions that enable them to live a healthy, active, and fulfilling life.

🔬

Innovation Driven

Precision-engineered solutions developed with healthcare professionals

✅

Quality First

Rigorous testing and inspection on every product before delivery

🛡️

Built to Last

Durable materials and robust construction for daily clinical use

🤝

Expert Support

Dedicated customer support and after-sales service across India

OUR RANGE

Comprehensive Product Categories

From advanced neuro rehabilitation robots to basic physiotherapy consumables — we cover every need of modern rehabilitation centres and hospitals.

Neuro Rehab → Physiotherapy → Occupational Therapy → Pediatric Rehab → Hospital Furniture →
Neuro Rehab

Gait Training & Evaluation System

Based on neural plasticity principles — simulates real walking mechanics with mechanical leg support, restoring normal walking function in neurological patients.

View All Products →
Neuro Rehab

Upper Extremity Feedback Training & Evaluation System

Ergonomic upper limb weight reduction manipulator with incentive feedback games and standardized evaluation tools for upper limb and brain recovery.

View All Products →
Neuro Rehab

Lower Extremity Feedback Training System (ZEPU-X8)

Multi-integrated intelligent rehabilitation system for functional gait reconstruction in ultra-early bedridden patients — active, passive, and electric standing modes.

View All Products →
Neuro Rehab

Multifunctional System for Hand Training (AE-SG1)

12 types of hand function training programs — improves hand movement control, muscle strength, proprioception, and joint mobility. Treats up to 4 patients simultaneously.

View All Products →
Physiotherapy

TECAR Therapy & Electrotherapy Devices

Advanced TECAR therapy, IFT, Ultrasound therapy (1 & 3 MHz), TENS devices, traction units, and combination therapy devices for comprehensive electrotherapy.

View All Products →
Physiotherapy

Electrotherapy Range — IFT, TENS, MS & Ultrasound

Electrophyt IFT (150 programs), Ultraphyt Plus ultrasound, Perfect TENS 4-CH device, INTERSTAT traction system, DUOPHYT TENS/EMS and Cryo Air Therapy.

View All Products →
Occupational Therapy

Advanced Training Stair (MSR-PRO)

3-in-1 stair, slope, and parallel bars system for ADL training — height adjustable, fire retardant PVC treads, 400 kg static load capacity.

View All Products →
Occupational Therapy

Upper Limb Rehabilitation Robot (SY-UEA2)

CE, FDA & ISO certified robotic arm for stroke, brain injury, cerebral palsy, and Parkinson's patients. Intelligent data analysis, multi-dimensional training modes.

View All Products →
Pediatric Rehab

Perturbation Training Board & Sensory Integration

Improves balance, neuromuscular coordination, and body regulation in children. Suitable for autism, pervasive developmental disorders, and central nervous system coordination issues.

View All Products →
Hospital Furniture

Clinical Furniture & Therapy Tables

Chiropractic tables, Electric Bobath tables, Saddle chairs, Swivel stools, Surgeon therapy chairs, Inversion tables, and Rehab suspension units — all clinically graded.

View All Products →
WHY PHYTNESS

The Phytness Difference

We don't just supply equipment — we deliver recovery outcomes backed by technology, expertise, and genuine after-sales care.

🏭

In-House Manufacturing

State-of-the-art manufacturing facility with every product precision-engineered by skilled craftsmen and engineers.

🔰

CE & ISO Certified

Products meet international quality and safety standards. CE, FDA & ISO certifications across our premium product lines.

📐

Custom Solutions

We work closely with hospitals and physiotherapy centres to understand specific requirements and deliver tailored solutions.

🗺️

Pan-India Presence

Offices and support teams in Bangalore, Hubli, Mumbai, and Pune for fast delivery and responsive after-sales service.

🧠

Clinical Expertise

Products co-developed with physiotherapists and rehabilitation specialists for real clinical effectiveness.

📞

Dedicated Support

Comprehensive installation, training, and ongoing technical support — we stay with you long after delivery.
